# ZAOfractal - llms.txt

> The weekly Respect Game, 100+ weeks unbroken. The only music-focused fractal in existence, the only active fractal on Optimism, and one of two on the Ethereum Superchain. Governance from contribution, not capital.

ZAOfractal is the public documentation home of ZAO Fractal - a soulbound peer-ranked governance ritual run weekly by The ZAO music community since around August 2024. The repo (github.com/ZAODEVZ/ZAOfractal) holds:

- A shallow reference layer (16 docs covering the fractal-governance lineage from Daniel Larimer through to ZAO).
- A deep research layer (35+ files, 500+ unique primary sources) covering theory, mechanism, code-walks, communities, the Optimystics tool catalog, and the Eden Creators Garden inventory.
- A whitepaper-in-progress (11 chapters; Ch.1-3 v0.1 drafts shipped May 24 2026, Ch.4-11 in subsequent drafts).
- A canonical RESOURCES.md master index of every URL, contract, person, repo, and paper cited.

## Site URLs

- Home: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/
- Whitepaper: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/whitepaper
- Research: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/research
- Reference: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/reference
- Lineage timeline: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/lineage
- People: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/people
- Bibliography: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/bibliography
- Resources master index: https://zaofractal.vercel.app/resources
- Source repo: https://github.com/ZAODEVZ/ZAOfractal

## On-chain (Optimism / OP Mainnet)

- OREC executor: 0xcB05F9254765CA521F7698e61E0A6CA6456Be532
- OG Respect (ERC-20, Fractals 1-73): 0x34cE89baA7E4a4B00E17F7E4C0cb97105C216957
- ZOR Respect (ERC-1155, Fractals 74+): 0x9885CCeEf7E8371Bf8d6f2413723D25917E7445c

## Brand glossary (exact spellings)

ORDAO, OREC, ZOR, $ZAO Respect, The ZAO, ZAO Fractal, ZAO OS, BetterCallZaal, ZABAL, WaveWarZ, FISHBOWLZ, SongJam, COC Concertz, NERDDAO, Daniel Larimer, Dan SingJoy, Tadas Vaitiekunas, sim31, Eden Fractal, Optimism Fractal, Fractally, Optimystics, Discord.thezao.com.

## Key facts

- Cadence: Mondays 6pm EST weekly + ad-hoc with 4+ unplayed members.
- Bot: fractalbotmarch2026 v2.1 (52 slash commands).
- Submission UI: zao.frapps.xyz/submitBreakout.
- Scoring: 2x Fibonacci (110/68/42/26/16/10 per rank in a 6-person group). Eden uses standard 1x (55/34/21/13/8/5).
- Decay: 2% weekly, ~34-week half-life.
- Gini: ~0.23 (vs typical token-DAO 0.97-0.99).
